title: Garam Masala Kale Chaat
description: A one-pot dish featuring kale, spiced with garam masala and caramelized to create a crunchy, spicy treat that's dairy-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: A few pinches of red pepper flakes (optional)

instructions: Wash and tear the kale leaves into small pieces.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil, onions if using, and garlic; sauté until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the torn kale to the skillet and cook for another 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning, until it begins to wilt slightly.
Stir in garam masala powder and salt. Cook for an additional 2 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Gently toss in lemon juice, reduce heat to low, and cook for a further 5-7 minutes or until the kale is tender and the liquid has thickened slightly.
If desired, stir in red pepper flakes (if using) for an extra kick of heat. Remove from heat and serve hot as a snack with whole-grain crackers or seeds on top.
